# 成长型思维

成长型思维 is a core concept in cognitive science and psychology. Closely related to [[neuroplasticity]], [[metacognition]], [[bloom-taxonomy]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
